DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF JULIA KELLER MCINTYRE.

APPEARANCES: Julie Keller-Mcintyre, 650/563-9463 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Eric K. Shiu, Esq. of Lynch and Shupe, LLP 650/579-5950 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - sustained without leave to amend. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
